channel.title: Happy Jack Media Blog
channel.description: Stories, updates, and behind-the-scenes from Happy Jack Media, an independent documentary studio.

item.title: The Summer My Family Fell in Love with the World Cup
item.description: From a packed pub beneath the Empire State Building to camping in the mountains on the Fourth of July — how the 2026 World Cup became a family story.

item.title: Thanksgiving Update
item.description: Reflecting on a year of movement — filming across the country, refining the three-act structure, and celebrating selection for the Florence International Film Festival.

item.title: Story Circle, Documentary Updates and More!
item.description: How Dan Harmon's story circle is shaping This Is Not A Draft, plus how we're staying organized with Milanote — and a big thanks to the crew.

item.title: Coffee with the Canons
item.description: Jack and Jennie Canon launch a new vlog series covering two parallel projects: Jennie's first book and Jack's documentary about Post-9/11 veterans.
